description: Death of a woman due to dowry harassment within 7 years of marriage.

law: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005
description: Physical, emotional, sexual, or economic abuse against women in domestic settings.
punishment: Protection orders, residence rights, compensation, imprisonment for breach of orders.

description: Assaulting woman with intent to disrobe.

description: Rape by a group of persons.
